unresolved_questions: All 12 products classified from nav-bar text and the V-BAT product page only; 10 individual product pages (enterprise, edge-os, pilot, forge, commander, benchmark, vidar, tracker, tracker-c-uas, x-bat) were skipped with status skipped_class_budget, so descriptors and readiness are derived from short nav blurbs rather than full product pages.
X-BAT readiness set to unknown — page was skipped; product appears to be in development/early deployment based on press release titles in crawl_index but no ordering language was found in the corpus.
NDAA and Blue UAS status unknown for all products — no compliance page in the corpus made product-level NDAA or Blue UAS claims.
Hivemind Pilot is marketed as 'Pilot' in the site nav (https://shield.ai/pilot/) but as 'Hivemind Pilot' in product-context references; the full product page was skipped.
